name: AWS Activate (Founders)
credits: Up to $5,000 (starts with $1,000, select participants may qualify for additional credits)
eligibility: Self-funded/bootstrapped, pre-Series B, founded in the last 10 years, AWS account on Paid Tier plan

name: AWS Activate (AI)
credits: Up to $200,000 (Activate Portfolio, via Activate Provider Org ID)
eligibility: Backed by a qualifying VC/accelerator/incubator, or via an Activate Provider Org ID (e.g. NVIDIA Inception)

name: Google Cloud for Startups (AI)
eligibility: AI core product, Vertex/Gemini, institutional funding required

name: DigitalOcean Startups (formerly Hatch)
credits: $10,000/month limit on credits for 12 months (no fixed total published; awarded via approved partners), plus 15 months of free Standard-tier support
eligibility: Raised $10M or less, company website + business email required, registered DigitalOcean team account; AI-native startups prioritized, service-based/consulting startups not eligible
status_note: Rebranded from "DigitalOcean Hatch" to "DigitalOcean Startups"; previous flat "$100,000" figure is no longer published on the official page.

name: Oracle for Startups
status_note: Official page is a stale 2022 marketing shell; no active startup credit offer, only the standard $300 OCI free trial.

name: Cloudflare for Startups
credits: $10K (bootstrapped) / $100K (<$5M raised + partner VC) / $350K ($5M+ raised + partner VC)

name: Scaleway Founders
credits: EUR 1,000 (Founders) / EUR 9,000 over 6 mo (Early Stage) / EUR 36,000 over 12 mo (Growth Stage)
eligibility: <5 yrs old, <50 employees, not yet a Scaleway client
status_note: Official page publishes three tiers (Founders/Early Stage/Growth Stage); previous entry only reflected the base Founders tier.

name: Backblaze Flamethrower Startup Program
credits: Up to $100,000 in Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage credits
eligibility: Typically <7 yrs old, <100 employees; venture-backed, accelerator-backed, or bootstrapped; data-intensive products (AI/ML, video/media, gaming, analytics)
status_note: Rebranded as "Backblaze Flamethrower" (relaunched Feb 2026); same URL and credit amount as before.

name: Railway Startup
status_note: startup.railway.app now returns 404; program appears discontinued.

name: Modal Startups
credits: Thousands of free GPU credits (exact amount not publicly disclosed; tiered by funding stage)
eligibility: Seed-Series A: VC funding from Modal's partner network, or >$1M raised from any fund. Series B+: >$30M raised or post-Series B via partner-network VC. Must be new to Modal.

name: Nebius AI (standalone)
eligibility: Requires $5M+ raised, applied for via a venture partner

name: Perplexity for Startups
status_note: Application typeform is closed; program not currently accepting applicants.

name: OpenRouter Startup
credits: Up to $5,000 in universal inference credits (0% processing fees) + processing-fee waiver for 12 months; credits expire 6 months after issuance
eligibility: Pre-Series B AI-native startups, referred by an approved OpenRouter partner, <$500 lifetime spend on OpenRouter, first-time applicants

name: Databricks for Startups
credits: Up to $200,000 combined credits across Databricks and Neon (relaunched June 2026 as consolidated offering)
eligibility: Data/AI startups; apply directly or ask your investor

name: Snowflake for Startups
credits: Free usage on first contract (amount not published); separate competitive Startup Challenge/Accelerator offers up to $1M investment
eligibility: Data-core, AI/ML, or large/complex-dataset startups; register interest via contact form

name: Vercel AI Accelerator
credits: Over $8,000,000 in combined credits (Vercel $1.2M, AWS $1M, Anthropic $600K, and more)
eligibility: 6-week cohort program, 40 teams globally, pre-seed AI builders, must be a Vercel customer

name: Redis for Startups
credits: Free Redis for 6 months (usage limits apply)
eligibility: Startups; official page does not publish a fixed dollar credit figure

name: PlanetScale for Startups
credits: Migration credits, case-by-case amount (no fixed published figure)
eligibility: Evaluated individually; contact PlanetScale about migration options

name: PostHog for Startups
eligibility: Company must be under 2 years old

name: Segment Startup
status_note: Segment's standalone startup program page is gone; traffic redirects to Twilio.

name: Mixpanel for Startups
credits: First year free Startup Plan (~$145,000 value)
eligibility: <$8M raised and <5 yrs old, no VC required

name: Webflow for Startups
status_note: Closed to new applications as of June 30, 2026.

name: GitHub for Startups
credits: $10,000 in platform credits (12 months) toward Enterprise, Copilot, Advanced Security
eligibility: Affiliated with a GitHub for Startups partner, funded up to Series B, new to GitHub Enterprise (not on Enterprise plan in past 6 months)

name: GitLab for Startups
credits: Seed stage (<=$5M funding): free Ultimate license yr 1 (up to 20 seats), 50% off yr 2. Early stage (Series A/B, <=$20M funding): 50% off yr 1, 25% off yr 2 (up to 20 users)
eligibility: Externally funded companies only (self-funded not currently eligible), new GitLab customers, funding validated via Crunchbase/Pitchbook/VC/accelerator documentation

name: Twilio for Startups
status_note: Twilio confirms: "We do not offer additional credits to startups at this time."

name: Deel for Startups
credits: Free U.S. Payroll for founders for life; first 5 seats free for life
eligibility: Venture-backed, must have raised at least $500K in funding (verifiable on Crunchbase)
status_note: Official page now describes a specific "free payroll for founders for life" offer with a $500K funding threshold, replacing the previously generic "<200 employees" description.

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: YC Startup School

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: Sequoia Arc

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: a16z Speedrun

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: Antler

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: 500 Global FounderHub

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: Techstars Perks

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: NVIDIA Inception

category: PRIORITY TIER 2: Accelerator Perk Programs (Massive Value)
name: Fin.ai Startup Pack
Claude for Startups (Anthropic)
eligibility: Institutional equity funding, founded <4 yrs, no prior Anthropic startup credits (program itself open to any early-stage founder)

name: Deepgram AI Startup Program
credits: Up to $100,000 in API credits (12 months)
eligibility: AI builder or early-stage startup, in production or launching within 6 months

name: AssemblyAI Startup Program
credits: Up to 200,000 hours in free credits

name: Runway Builders Program
eligibility: Pre-Seed through Series C, bootstrapped OK

name: Baseten AI Startup Program
credits: Up to $25,000 (Dedicated Inference/Training) or up to $2,500 (Model APIs)
eligibility: AI-first, Seed-Series A, founded <5 yrs, net-new Baseten customer

name: Stripe for Startups
credits: Fee credits + financial support (amount varies by application)

name: Linear for Startups
credits: Up to 6 months free (Basic or Business plan)
eligibility: Non-paying user, <50 employees, requires partner code from an official Linear partner (VC/accelerator/incubator)

name: Framer for Startups
eligibility: Early-stage (pre-seed/seed), live website, business email, non-agency

name: Coda for Startups
eligibility: <5 yrs old, <$10M raised, business domain, no prior paid Coda subscription

name: Help Scout for Startups
credits: 6 months free (Plus plan) or $600 in credit toward Standard/Plus/Pro
eligibility: New Help Scout customer, incorporated tech startup <2 yrs old, <$1M ARR; bootstrapped OK, no VC required

name: LangSmith for Startups
credits: Build tier: discounted seat pricing; Scale tier: $10,000 in credits (2 yrs for YC startups)
eligibility: Build: first-time customer, <$10M raised, $25K+ seed raised; Scale: Series A or earlier (up to $50M raised), backed by a premier LangChain VC partner

name: ClickUp for Startups
eligibility: Affiliated with an approved funding partner (accelerator/incubator/VC), <=Series B raised, incorporated <5 yrs ago, new to ClickUp or on Free Forever plan

name: Neon for Startups
credits: Self-funded: up to $1,000 in Neon credits; VC-backed: up to $200,000 combined Neon + Databricks credits (12 months)
eligibility: Self-funded track: <$1M funding, early-stage/MVP; VC-backed track: $1M+ raised or recognized accelerator (e.g. YC)

name: Sentry for Startups
credits: Up to $5,000 in credits (expires after 12 months) + priority support
eligibility: Founded in last 2 years, raised less than $5M in VC funding, new to paying for Sentry

name: Convex for Startups
credits: Up to 1 year free Convex Professional (no seat fees) + 30% off usage fees up to $30,000
eligibility: Pre-seed to Series A, <$3M raised, <20 employees, <3 yrs old, live website/MVP

name: Statsig Startup Program (Be Significant)
credits: $50,000+ in value - full Enterprise tier for 12 months, 1B events included
eligibility: Founded <5 yrs ago, <$50M raised; best fit for startups with 25K+ MAU scaling fast

name: Kiro Startup Credits Program (via AWS)
credits: Up to 1 year of Kiro Pro+ free, tiered (Starter/Growth/Scale); credits auto-applied to AWS account
eligibility: Early-stage to Series A, VC-backed, business email matching startup domain, matching AWS Account ID, must NOT have active AWS Activate credits

name: Typeform Startup Discount
credits: Up to 75% off annual Business plan
eligibility: Not a current paying Typeform customer, <$5M raised, <50 employees, founded within last 5 yrs

name: Customer.io Startup Program
credits: Up to 12 months free, including up to 30,000 customer profiles
eligibility: <$10M total funding raised, never previously a Customer.io customer, contact lists obtained organically

name: Braze for Startups
credits: Free access (duration unspecified on official page)
eligibility: Primarily VC-backed startups via Braze's investor partners; not self-serve, requires "Connect with a Startup Expert" contact form to confirm eligibility

name: Vanta for Startups
eligibility: Targeted at venture-backed/YC-backed startups; new customers only; not self-serve (funnels to sales demo), precise thresholds not published

name: Replit for Startups
credits: Up to $25,000 in Replit credits (tiered: full amount if backed by a listed Select Partner fund/accelerator; free Replit Pro via broader Partner Network; can still apply if unlisted)
eligibility: Must apply with a company email (personal Gmail/Outlook addresses rejected); manually reviewed

name: Turso for Startups
credits: Database usage credits (exact amount not publicly disclosed, set upon acceptance)
eligibility: Venture-backed with at least one completed funding round; early-stage or actively scaling

name: Cohere for Startups
credits: 25% discount on Cohere proprietary models for 12 months + technical support and co-marketing

name: Attio for Startups
credits: 80% off Annual Pro Plan (year 1), 50% off if $5M+ raised but pre-Series B; 30% off year 2; plus $5,000 credit via NachoNacho and partner perks (e.g. months free of Notion/Linear)
eligibility: Venture-backed or affiliated with an Attio startup partner (VC/accelerator); apply within 90 days of account signup

name: Groq for Startups
credits: $10,000 in inference credits (expire 90 days after being awarded)
eligibility: Early-stage startups; eligibility determined at Groq's sole discretion

name: Temporal Cloud for Startups
eligibility: Funded startups that have raised $30M or less; self-serve application

name: Superhuman Mail for Startups
credits: 1 year free Business Plan (up to 5 seats)
eligibility: Raised no more than $10M in equity, fewer than 50 employees, affiliated with a Superhuman Approved Startup Partner (accelerator/investor/incubator), not an existing Superhuman Mail customer

name: E2B for Startups
credits: $20,000 in usage credits + Pro Tier membership (up to 100 concurrent sandboxes, 24-hour sessions)
eligibility: Raised less than $5M in funding, company less than 3 years old, first-time E2B users; building AI agents/sandboxed compute (open-source or proprietary)

name: Phala Startup Program
credits: Up to $1,000 in cloud credits (Confidential VM, GPU TEE, private model API usage) + architecture review and launch support
eligibility: Pre-seed to Series A, building private/verifiable AI products (confidential inference, verifiable agents, or regulated-data applications); no prior TEE experience required

name: Braintrust for Startups
credits: 6-12 months of Braintrust Pro plan access ($249/mo in platform credits, plus 5GB processed data, 50K scores, 30-day retention), exclusive office hours, executive event invites
eligibility: New customers at Series A or earlier; $100K+ funding gets 6 months, startups funded by partner VCs (a16z, Accel, Greylock, ICONIQ, Kleiner Perkins) get 12 months

name: Beefree SDK Startup Program
credits: 90% discount for 12 months on Core ($100/mo) or Superpowers ($250/mo) plans, plus priority support and access to 2,000+ email/page templates
eligibility: Founded <3 yrs ago, <$5M total funding raised (exceptions considered on application)

name: Apollo for Startups
credits: 50% off Basic or Professional plan for 1 year (up to 5 seats)
eligibility: <20 employees, no existing Apollo subscription, valid company domain; affiliation with an Apollo ecosystem partner (VC/accelerator/community) preferred but not required to apply

name: Fillout Startup Discount
credits: 50% off any paid plan for 1 year
eligibility: <5 yrs old, privately held, <10 employees, new Fillout customer

name: Apodex Frontier Program
credits: Complimentary compute credits (up to $100,000/month for strategic partners) + full Discover Mode access + dedicated engineering support
eligibility: Formally registered academic institutions, research institutes, or startups with a defined research focus in complex multi-step reasoning, evidence synthesis, or deep scientific discovery; requires verifiable domain expertise (Google Scholar/GitHub/institutional website); excludes pure commercial use (content generation, marketing, customer service) and unaffiliated individuals
status_note: Newly launched program (announced 2026-07-21); niche fit for deep-tech/scientific-research startups, not general-purpose commercial startups.

name: Drata for Startups (Startup Stack)
eligibility: Must have an investor on Drata's participating VC/firm list (or request investor be added); available at all funding stages for first Drata contract
